Oshanodes Agro Expansion Announcement

By Oshanodes Communications

June 10, 2024

We are excited to announce a major expansion of Oshanodes Agro operations. Starting this season, we are establishing farming operations in three new regions within the Benue Valley.

This expansion represents our commitment to scaling sustainable agriculture while creating economic opportunities for local farming communities. Each new region will employ 50+ farmers and create value-added processing jobs.

The expansion includes investment in modern processing facilities, farmer training programs, and community development initiatives. We expect to increase our rice and bean production by 40% while maintaining our strict quality and sustainability standards.

This growth positions Oshanodes Agro to serve more customers across West Africa while deepening our positive community impact.
